Description: Large Lugian Sinew tier line — custom WCIDs 850344-850347. Clones from 7043; MirrorEmoteFromWcid 7043. Blue IconUnderlay 100676435 + black number overlays 1-4. ReplaceSiblingWcids includes both 7043 (Large) and 7042 (Small) to remove both vanilla sinews from the loot pool.

Weenies.Notes: Regular tier (custom). Frost (128) glow. Overlay '1' top-right black (100690976).

PropertiesString.Name: Large Lugian Sinew
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.

Weenies.Notes: Quality tier. Acid (256) glow. Overlay '2' top-right black (100690977).

PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.

PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.
